raw.completionBudgetReport: Goal achieved. Report final usage from this tool result's structured goal fields. If goal.tokenBudget is present, include token usage from goal.tokensUsed and goal.tokenBudget. qualityGate.goal: Increase LTP stable batch from 63 to 75 cases per libc per arch with targeted validation before final full gate.

promotionPolicy.timeoutSemantics: case status 137/143 and timeout errors still emit FAIL LTP CASE plus TIMEOUT LTP CASE and increment failed/timed_out

nonLtpObservations.note: Full evaluator commands exit 0, but non-LTP benchmark timeout/end:fail markers remain outside this LTP stable promotion gate.

abiVisibleChanges: getsid(2) dispatch added and returns stored session id for current/visible process or ESRCH for missing targets
getpgid negative/missing target now returns ESRCH for this compatibility path
setsid now updates both pgid and sid but remains simplified and does not yet enforce Linux EPERM for process-group leaders
/proc/<pid>/stat session field now reports stored sid instead of mirroring pgid
prlimit64/getrlimit invalid resource returns EINVAL before copy-out/copy-in
wait child reap path joins the child task before teardown to reduce residual task/resource pressure
LTP harness default per-case timeout increased from 10s to 15s; timeout remains FAIL, not PASS

aiSlopCleaner.evidence: docs/ltp-score-improvement-2026-05-23/final-gate-ai-slop-cleaner-report.md; changed-file anti-slop scan passed: no new dependency, no case-name-specific syscall implementation, timeout-as-fail preserved, git diff --check exit 0, cargo fmt exit 0.

codeReview.evidence: docs/ltp-score-improvement-2026-05-23/final-gate-code-review-report.md; native code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR.

verification.evidence: docs/ltp-score-improvement-2026-05-23/final-gate-report.md: final LA/RV LTP PASS 150 FAIL 0, ltp-musl 75/0, ltp-glibc 75/0, TFAIL 0, TBROK 0, TCONF 4, LTP timeout 0, ENOSYS 0, panic/trap 0; all required commands exit 0.
